core.zh: 私有工作区结构清晰，客户端/WZ/IDB 等资产保持 local-only。
core.en: Private workspace layout is clear; client/WZ/IDB assets stay local-only.

core.zh: 统一 contract runner 已扩展到约 30+ 个 host-side contract / analyzer gates，覆盖 packet、ZTL、ActionMan、AvatarLook、network、SetField、field runtime、MovePath、cString、data、ctrl、interface 等。
core.en: The unified contract runner now covers roughly 30+ host-side contract / analyzer gates across packet, ZTL, ActionMan, AvatarLook, network, SetField, field runtime, MovePath, cString, data, ctrl, interface, and more.

core.zh: CInPacket / COutPacket host-side value model、reader/writer、differential fixtures 与 DecodeBuffer contract 已覆盖基础 packet 语义。
core.en: Host-side CInPacket / COutPacket value models, reader/writer checks, differential fixtures, and DecodeBuffer contracts cover basic packet semantics.

core.zh: ZXString、ZRef hidden-result pointer、array-byte、simple wrappers、stream wrappers 等 ZTL contract 面已扩展。
core.en: ZTL contract coverage now includes ZXString, hidden-result ZRef pointers, array-byte checks, simple wrappers, and stream wrappers.

core.zh: 已有 socket/packet seam skeleton、network compile contract 与 DecodeBuffer source-contract 面；raw socket、encryption、buffer lifecycle 未完整建模。
core.en: Socket/packet seam skeleton, network compile contract, and DecodeBuffer source-contract coverage exist; raw socket, encryption, and buffer lifecycle are not fully modeled.

core.zh: SelectWorldResult、AvatarLook::Decode 有 IDA/runtime 证据；WorldInformation、SelectCharacterResult 与 send-side contracts 未完成。
core.en: SelectWorldResult and AvatarLook::Decode have IDA/runtime evidence; WorldInformation, SelectCharacterResult, and send-side contracts remain pending.

core.zh: SetField(0x008D) prefix、FILETIME tail、当前 fixture offset map 已建立；field type / low-risk helpers / temporary-stat policy 等 field-adjacent contracts 已扩展，完整 CharacterData 仍是长尾。
core.en: SetField(0x008D) prefix, FILETIME tail, and current fixture offset map are established; field type, low-risk helpers, and temporary-stat policy contracts expanded, while full CharacterData remains a long tail.

core.zh: local user 0x002C clean fixture 已 decode/re-encode；MovePath 变体、option gate 与 runtime differential 覆盖仍待扩展。
core.en: A clean local user 0x002C movement fixture is decoded/re-encoded; broader MovePath variants, option gates, and runtime differential coverage remain pending.

core.zh: 0x00F1 / 0x013A 已归属为 NPC movement stream，并和 local user movement 分离；reader/writer prefix/body 对齐。
core.en: 0x00F1 / 0x013A are attributed as the NPC movement stream, separated from local user movement, with reader/writer prefix and body alignment.

core.zh: ActionMan path contract 与 action mapping helpers 已进入 host-side contract；完整资源系统未重构。
core.en: ActionMan path contracts and action mapping helpers are in the host-side contract set; the full resource system is not reconstructed.

core.zh: Batch008 已记录 cString accessor、pointer-view、ASCII search/compare 的窄 host-side source-contract facts；不声明生产布局、allocator/lifetime、imported API parity 或 verified。
core.en: Batch008 records narrow cString accessor, pointer-view, and ASCII search/compare host-side source-contract facts; no production layout, allocator/lifetime, imported API parity, or verified status is claimed.

core.zh: 低风险 host-side source contracts 已扩展到 field constants、temporary stat、party quest、minigame、encoding、NM、core、CTRL、interface、data 等方向。
core.en: Low-risk host-side source contracts now cover field constants, temporary stat, party quest, minigame, encoding, NM, core, CTRL, interface, data, and related lanes.

milestones.name: Login smoke
milestones.zh: 登录链路可通过自动化 smoke。

milestones.name: Character select smoke
milestones.zh: 选人流程可进入后续 migration。
milestones.en: Character select can proceed into migration.

milestones.name: Channel migration
milestones.zh: SelectCharacter 后可切入 channel-side MigrateIn。
milestones.en: After SelectCharacter, the client reaches channel-side MigrateIn.

milestones.name: Field entry map 10000
milestones.zh: clean baseline 可见进入 tutorial map。
milestones.en: Clean baseline reaches visible tutorial map.

milestones.name: Field CRC clean baseline
milestones.zh: map 10000 的 live client CRC 与 Kinoko 对照值匹配。
milestones.en: Live client CRC for map 10000 matches the Kinoko comparison value.

milestones.name: SetField boundary
milestones.zh: SetField prefix、seed、FILETIME tail 和当前 CharacterData section map 已建立。
milestones.en: SetField prefix, seeds, FILETIME tail, and the current CharacterData section map are established.

milestones.name: Host contract suite
milestones.zh: 统一 contract runner 覆盖约 30+ 个 contract / analyzer gates。
milestones.en: The unified contract runner covers roughly 30+ contract / analyzer gates.

milestones.name: Formal promotions
milestones.zh: 当前 formal promotions 为 147；verified 仍为 0。
milestones.en: Current formal promotions are 147; verified remains 0.

milestones.name: Local user move 0x002C
milestones.zh: 已有一条 clean 112-byte movement fixture，可由 contract split decode/re-encode。
milestones.en: One clean 112-byte local movement fixture is split-decoded and re-encoded by contracts.

milestones.name: NPC movement 0x00F1/0x013A
milestones.zh: 已确认是 NPC movement stream，不再混入 local user move。
milestones.en: Confirmed as NPC movement stream, not local user movement.

milestones.name: Full CharacterData
milestones.zh: 当前 fixture map 较强，但完整 nested decode 未完成。
milestones.en: Current fixture map is strong, but full nested decode is not complete.

milestones.name: Full MovePath variants
milestones.zh: core body 与一个 clean sample 已验证；更多 attr/option/tail 变体待补。
milestones.en: Core body and one clean sample are validated; more attr/option/tail variants are pending.

serverData.zh: 作为当前主服务端对照与自动化测试台，clean CRC/portal baseline 稳定。
serverData.en: Current main server comparison target and automation testbed, with stable clean CRC/portal baseline.

serverData.zh: proof map 已对齐，广域 map corpus 与 linked-map 仍待扩展。
serverData.en: Proof maps match; broader map corpus and linked-map coverage remain pending.

serverData.zh: tuto00 正常路径和 portal CRC 已在 clean run 对齐，旧 NUL 现象降级为 stale。
serverData.en: Normal tuto00 path and portal CRC match in clean runs; older NUL observations are treated as stale.

serverData.zh: 计划做 overlay/catalog，不分发 WZ。
serverData.en: Planned as overlay/catalog work; WZ files are not distributed.

serverData.zh: 计划整理 v95 服务端、WZ 工具、汉化资源的可信度目录。
serverData.en: Planned trust catalog for v95 servers, WZ tools, and localization resources.
